scripts.build: npm run build -w @minutematch/shared && npm run build -w @minutematch/server && npm run build -w @minutematch/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @minutematch/shared && npm run build -w @minutematch/web
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w @minutematch/shared && npm run build -w @minutematch/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @minutematch/shared && npm run typecheck -w @minutematch/server && npm run typecheck -w @minutematch/web
